title: A Mind Forever Voyaging
author: Steve Meretzky
genre: An AI simulates the future to test the impact of a new government plan.

title: Arthur: The Quest for Excalibur
author: Bob Bates
genre: You are young Arthur on a quest to pull Excalibur from the stone and prove your right to rule.

title: Ballyhoo
author: Jeff O'Neill
genre: A mystery set in a traveling circus where you must find a missing girl.

title: Beyond Zork
author: Brian Moriarty
genre: An RPG-style adventure in the Zork universe where you seek the Coconut of Quendor.

title: Border Zone
author: Marc Blank
genre: A real-time espionage thriller set in a fictional Cold War-era country.

title: Bureaucracy
author: Douglas Adams
genre: A comedic satire about the frustrations of modern life and red tape.

title: Cutthroats
author: Michael Berlyn and Jerry Wolper
genre: You are a diver searching for sunken treasure while dealing with treacherous characters.

title: Deadline
author: Marc Blank
genre: The first interactive murder mystery, where you have 12 hours to solve a case.

title: Enchanter
author: Marc Blank and Dave Lebling
genre: A fantasy adventure where a novice magician must stop an evil warlock.

title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
author: Douglas Adams and Steve Meretzky
genre: A surreal comedy based on the book series.

title: Hollywood Hijinx
author: "Hollywood" Dave Anderson
genre: A scavenger hunt in a Hollywood mansion to claim an inheritance.

title: Infidel
author: Michael Berlyn
genre: An archaeological adventure set in an Egyptian pyramid, featuring an anti-hero.

title: Journey: The Quest for Isme
author: Marc Blank
genre: A party-based RPG/adventure hybrid following a group on a quest to save their land.

title: Milliways
author: Douglas Adams and Steve Meretzky
genre: The unreleased sequel to The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy.

title: Mini-Zork I
author: Marc Blank and Dave Lebling
genre: A compact version of the original Zork I: The Great Underground Empire.

title: Mini-Zork II
author: Marc Blank and Dave Lebling
genre: A compact version of Zork II: The Wizard of Frobozz.

title: Moonmist
author: Stu Galley and Jim Lawrence
genre: A mystery for younger players set in a haunted Cornish castle.

title: Nord and Bert Couldn't Make Head or Tail of It
author: Jeff O'Neill
genre: A collection of wordplay-based short stories.

title: Planetfall
author: Steve Meretzky
genre: A sci-fi comedy about a stranded space cadet and his robot companion, Floyd.

title: Plundered Hearts
author: Amy Briggs
genre: A romantic adventure set on the high seas during the age of piracy.

title: Seastalker
author: Stu Galley and Jim Lawrence
genre: A junior-level adventure involving a submarine and a sea monster.

title: Sherlock: The Riddle of the Crown Jewels
author: Bob Bates
genre: You play as Watson, assisting Holmes in solving a royal theft.

title: Shogun
author: Dave Lebling
genre: An epic historical adventure set in feudal Japan, adapted from James Clavell.

title: Sorcerer
author: Steve Meretzky
genre: The sequel to Enchanter, where you must rescue your mentor Belboz.

title: Spellbreaker
author: Dave Lebling
genre: The final Enchanter game, dealing with the failure of magic itself.

title: Starcross
author: Dave Lebling
genre: A sci-fi adventure exploring a massive alien spaceship.

title: Stationfall
author: Steve Meretzky
genre: The sequel to Planetfall, featuring the return of Floyd.

title: Suspect
author: Dave Lebling
genre: A murder mystery set at a Halloween masquerade ball.

title: Suspended: A Cryogenic Nightmare
author: Michael Berlyn
genre: A unique sci-fi game where you control six specialized robots from a cryogenic tank.

title: The Lurking Horror
author: Dave Lebling
genre: A horror story set on a university campus, inspired by Lovecraft.

title: Trinity
author: Brian Moriarty
genre: A sophisticated fantasy weaving together history, physics, and the atomic age.

title: Wishbringer
author: Brian Moriarty
genre: A magical quest for a beginner audience, featuring a wish-granting stone.

title: The Witness
author: Stu Galley
genre: A 1930s noir detective mystery.

title: Zork Zero: The Revenge of Megaboz
author: Steve Meretzky
genre: A prequel to the original Zork trilogy, featuring many mini-games.

title: Zork I: The Great Underground Empire
author: Marc Blank and Dave Lebling
genre: The classic dungeon crawl that started it all in the Great Underground Empire.

title: Zork I: The Great Underground Empire
author: Marc Blank and Dave Lebling
genre: You are standing west of a white house, with a boarded front door. Your quest: plunder the Great Underground Empire of its 19 treasures.

title: Zork II: The Wizard of Frobozz
author: Marc Blank and Dave Lebling
genre: Continued exploration of the Great Underground Empire as you face the Wizard of Frobozz.

title: Zork III: The Dungeon Master
author: Marc Blank and Dave Lebling
genre: The final chapter of the original trilogy, leading to a confrontation with the Dungeon Master.
